rows.function_desc: Used for upgrading rank.

rows.function_desc: Needed for clearing stages, tower trials and etc.

rows.name: Merits
rows.function_desc: Use to get 1 Merits

rows.name: Cursed Seal of Master Clan
rows.function_desc: The cursed seal that is branded on the Branch Family of the Hyuga Clan. The power of the Branch House will be improved greatly when the seal is broken.Used to recruit and upgrade Neji.

rows.name: Haku's Tears
rows.function_desc: Haku's tear before his death. It contains great affection to Zabuzan.Used to recruit and upgrade Momochi Zabuza.

rows.name: Book of Taboo
rows.function_desc: Witnessing the death of his companions, the originally kind-hearted Orochimaru realized how fragile and short life is. He took the forbidden book and chose the road to evil.Used to recruit and upgrade Orochimaru.

rows.name: Chidori
rows.function_desc: The high Concentration of Electricity produce a sound which like thousands of bird chirping.

rows.name: First Hokage's Relic
rows.function_desc: Crystal necklace that absorbs chakra, it is left by the first Hokage and can suppress the tailed beast.Used to recruit and upgrade Uzumaki Naruto.

rows.name: Sand Gourd
rows.function_desc: Gaara's mother turns chakra into sand and restore them in Gaara's body. This is how she protects Gaara.Used to recruit and upgrade Gaara.

rows.name: Icha Icha Paradise
rows.function_desc: Icha Icha Paradise is the present on Kakashi's 18th birthday and is  Kakashi's favorite.Used to recruit and upgrade Kakashi.

rows.name: Fire Will
rows.function_desc: The Will of Fire is inherited from the First Hokage till now. It states that every true Konoha shinobi must cherish and fight for the village's sake.Used to recruit and upgrade Jiraiya.

rows.name: Suzaku Ring
rows.function_desc: Ring that represents the southern Vermilion Bird. Used to recruit and upgrade Uchiha itachi.

rows.name: Sigil of Fire
rows.function_desc: A coagulation of fire will. Used to recruit and upgrade Namikaze Minato.

rows.name: Rinnnegann
rows.function_desc: Eye which is called the Three Great Dojutsu, it can both create and detroy everything.Used to recruit and upgrade White Sasuke.

rows.name: Angel of Paper
rows.function_desc: Always stands beside Pain who is the leader and Akatsuki and Amegakure. She is the intermediary between Pain and Ame, the villagers having given her the title "God's Angel".Used to recruit and upgrade Pein.

rows.name: Otoke Boya Yainma
rows.function_desc: Gedo Statue was the empty vessel of the Ten-Tails.Used to recruit and upgrade Sage Naruto.

rows.name: Ganju Shiba
rows.function_desc:
Ganju possesses a hot temper, a strong ego

and a deep hatred for Shinigami.

rows.name: Izuru Kira
rows.function_desc:
Izuru is a gloomy and introspective person,

not easily able to socialize with others.

He generally appears weak and indifferent, leading many to believe he lacks the ability to be a leader.

rows.name: Rangiku Matsumoto
rows.function_desc:
Rangiku tends to be a slacker who dislikes paperwork and loves to drink.

She is not the slightest bit modest about her appearance.

rows.function_desc: Shinigami Kensei is an irritable muscular man wearing a tank top.

rows.name: Kirinji Tenjirō
rows.function_desc:
Kirinji is a lean-built and very tall man with black hair arranged into an outlandishly large pompadour, or "regent" hairstyle, with tapered sideburns. He is frequently seen chewing upon a small stick. Instead of the standard Shinigami uniform,

he wears a waist-length white jacket that leaves most of his chest exposed but still bears the Royal Guard emblem on its back, as well as the alternating circle and diamond pattern of a captain's haori along the bottom.

rows.name: Yhwach
rows.function_desc: Yhwach is a tall man with long black hair and black beard. He has fierce appearance and reddish-brown eyes. He always wears a dark red cloak. Both sides of his coat have three silver medals.

Ichibe é uma pessoa grande e larga com uma cabeça careca olhos vermelhos

rows.name: Ōetsu Nimaiya
rows.function_desc:
Nimaiya is a dark-skinned man with thick, black hair that is shaven and dyed green on the sides of his head. He wears a variation of the Shinigami shihakushō, featuring instead a green undergarment, and a shortened hakama that exposes his lower legs.

Worn over this is a white, sleeveless puffer jacket that bears the Royal Guard emblem on its back, as well as the alternating circle and diamond pattern of a captain's haori along the bottom.

rows.name: Marechiyo Ōmaeda
rows.function_desc: Ōmaeda is an arrogant and dull man. He is cowardly, loud, vain, elitist, snobbish, greedy and sluggish. However, he is exceedingly loyal to his captain to the point that he is willing to fight along with his captain against enemies much stronger than himself.

rows.name: Yumichika Ayasegawa
rows.function_desc: Yumichika is a narcissist who judges almost everyone and everything by beauty. He is also incredibly vain. Yumichika is a powerful combatant and wanted to become the third Seat of his Division, as he thought the kanji for the number three was the most beautiful.

rows.name: Nemu Kurotsuchi
rows.function_desc: Lieutenant Kurotsuchi Nemu is an artificial entity created from the Gigai technology and Gikon technology by Captain Kurotsuchi. The same blood flows in Nemu and Captain Kurotsuchi, hence be it interest or how to spend free time, she will have many similarities as Captain Kurotsuchi.

rows.name: Yasutora Sado
rows.function_desc: Sado is a quiet person and is sometimes the subject of jokes or bullies because he never fights back. Nonetheless, he is treated equally within his group of friends in Karakura.

rows.name: Kaien Shiba
rows.function_desc: Kaien Shiba is the former lieutenant of the 13th Division, under Jūshirō Ukitake, up until his death at the hands of a Hollow that also killed his wife, Miyako Shiba. He was the brother of Kūkaku and Ganju.

rows.name: Orihime Inoue
rows.function_desc: Orihime is independent, friendly, humorous, sensitive, caring and kind. She comes off as naive and rather clueless, which is at odds with her exceptionally high marks in school.

rows.name: Yachiru Kusajishi
rows.function_desc: Yachiru is childlike in most aspects - she is small, cheerful, energetic and carefree most of the time. She is often seen latched onto the back of her captain, Kenpachi Zaraki, just over his left shoulder and is somewhat territorial about this position.

rows.name: Renji Abarai
rows.function_desc: Renji is quite dynamic. His personality varies from smug and cocky to disquieted and depressed after a major defeat, but shows himself to be an incredibly serious and determined fighter when confronted with an actual threat.

rows.name: Lisa Yadoumaru
rows.function_desc: In comparison to her comrades, Lisa is one of the calmer, more sensible members of the Visored, showing a quite stern, detached and secretive demeanor at most points, although she is somewhat temperamental and easily irritable.

rows.name: Rukia Kuchiki
rows.function_desc: Initially born into a lower class, Rukia retains her modesty, even as an adopted member of the nobility. She is graceful and "clean", yet chooses to talk to ordinary people. However, her cool and lone demeanor often forces her to hide her personal troubles, even from her friends.

rows.name: Momo Hinamori
rows.function_desc: Momo is generally an upbeat, easy-going, and friendly girl. She has a strong friendship with Tōshirō Hitsugaya, whom she grew up with, repeatedly calling him "Shirō-chan", despite his higher rank and complaints about this.

rows.name: Visored Hirako
rows.function_desc: Shinji is somewhat comical, adding a bit of levity to situations that are otherwise serious. He has a flippant attitude under normal circumstances and seems to like annoying his associate, Hiyori Sarugaki, which usually earns him a slap from one of her sandals.

rows.name: Komamura Sajin
rows.function_desc: Komamura is an anthropomorphic wolf, although he is often mistaken for a dog. Initially, he was very self-conscious about his appearance, so he wore gloves with bracers, as well as a helmet, to conceal his entire body.

rows.name: Kensei Muguruma
rows.function_desc: Kensei is a serious and decisive individual, though he is easily annoyed and is rather temperamental, often to a fault. He is greatly annoyed by immaturity, evident when Orihime infiltrates the Visored's hideout and jokingly asks where the bathroom is; Kensei is noticeably annoyed, only calming down when Lisa Yadōmaru and Love Aikawa remind him that it was only a joke

rows.name: Harribel
rows.function_desc: Harribel is calm, taciturn, level-headed, and analytical, preferring to not engage in combat: she is content with silently observing both parties until the fighting reaches its conclusion.

rows.name: Shihōin Yoruichi
rows.function_desc: Yoruichi is intelligent and witty, holding an intimate knowledge of Soul Society and its workings, as she was the former leader of the Onmitsukidō and the Second Division's captain. Although of noble birth, she acts differently from most other nobles, very much like Kaien Shiba.

rows.name: Kisuke Urahara
rows.function_desc: Kisuke Urahara is the former captain of the 12th Division, as well as the founder and 1st President of the Shinigami Research and Development Institute. He currently lives in the Human World after being exiled, where he owns a small convenience store, "Urahara Shop", which doubles in selling Shinigami items.

rows.name: Ikkaku Madarame
rows.function_desc: Ikkaku is violent, fight-loving, and rude, which has been noted by Tetsuzaemon Iba, among others. He loves fighting so much, he is unwilling to travel anywhere without a sword, resorting to carrying a wooden one when posing as a student at Karakura High School.

rows.name: Kaname Tōsen
rows.function_desc: Tōsen has dark skin and dark brown braids. He has pupil-less eyes that are a pale lavender and has been blind since birth. He was the captain of the 9th Division of the Gotei 13 until he betrayed Soul Society, alongside Sōsuke Aizen and Gin Ichimaru.

rows.name: Shunsui Kyōraku
rows.function_desc: Kyōraku is a laid-back and flamboyant man, evident in his style of dress and general attitude, and is rarely seen without a smile. In his off time, he often drinks sake in bars and naps. Other times, he likes to chase after women.

rows.name: Jūshirō Ukitake
rows.function_desc: Ukitake is well-respected and highly honorable, and always treats those around him with respect, even those who are weaker or not as highly ranked as he is. As a result, he can be easily approached by other members of Soul Society who seek favors or advice from the captain.

rows.name: Byakuya Kuchiki
rows.function_desc: Byakuya Kuchiki is the 28th head of the Kuchiki Clan, one of the four great noble clans in Soul Society. He is also the captain of the 6th Division in the Gotei 13, and his lieutenant is Renji Abarai.

rows.name: Kenpachi Zaraki
rows.function_desc: Although he is known to be a violent fighter, Kenpachi's actions tend to be for the best. He has a very poor sense of direction, at times asking Yachiru for help (even though her sense of direction is just as bad). Kenpachi lives for battle, and enjoys a good fight more than anything.

rows.name: Nnoitra Gilga
rows.function_desc: Personality-wise, Nnoitra is extremely rude and lecherous, accented by his snake-like eyes and perverted attitude towards Orihime, rudely referring to her as "pet-sama".

rows.name: Retsu Unohana
rows.function_desc: Retsu Unohana,formerly known as Yachiru Unohana, was the captain of the Fourth Division in the Gotei 13. She was one of the oldest and most experienced captains, and was the Soul Society's best healer, as well as the first person to wield the name Kenpachi.

rows.name: Baraggan Louisenbairn
rows.function_desc: Baraggan has the appearance of an elderly man, with a white mustache and white hair. His face is lined by large scars on the left side of his chin and across his right eye. Despite his aged appearance, Baraggan is quite stocky and muscular.

rows.name: Gin Ichimaru
rows.function_desc: Gin Ichimaru was the captain of the 3rd Division of the Gotei 13 until he betrayed Soul Society. He is a very mysterious man, since his almost constant smile and slitted eyes, combined with his heavy use of sarcasm and mocking politeness, make it very difficult to discern his thoughts.

rows.name: Suì-Fēng
rows.function_desc: Suì-Fēng is the commander-in-chief of the Onmitsukidō and the captain of the 2nd Division in the Gotei 13.

rows.name: Coyote Starrk
rows.function_desc: Starrk has blue-gray eyes and wavy, dark brown hair, which ends at the base of his neck, is always unkempt, and is parted down the middle. He has a faded goatee.

rows.name: Hollowed Ichigo
rows.function_desc: Ichigo, who becomes Shinigami, wears the Hollowed Visor and greatly increases in battle capabilities.

rows.name: Quincy Uryū
rows.function_desc: He followed his grandfather's footsteps and become a Quincy, very strong spiritual power.

rows.name: Sōsuke Aizen
rows.function_desc: Sōsuke Aizen is the former captain of the 5th Division in the Gotei 13. He later leaves Soul Society with his followers, Gin Ichimaru and Kaname Tōsen. Prior to his departure from Soul Society, Aizen appeared as a mild-featured man with brown scholarly hair enhanced by square glasses, along with soft brown eyes.

rows.function_desc: Shin Zabimaru Renji

rows.name: Sōō Zabimaru Renji
rows.function_desc: Sōō Zabimaru Renji

rows.name: Grimmjow Jaegerjaquez
rows.function_desc: Grimmjow Jaegerjaquez is an Arrancar and the Sexta (6th) Espada in Sōsuke Aizen's affiliated army. While appearing to be a laid-back individual, Grimmjow possesses a brutal, impulsive, and excessively violent personality alongside a lethally short temper.

rows.name: Ulquiorra
rows.function_desc: Ulquiorra Cifer is the Cuatro (4th) Espada in Aizen's army of Arrancar. Ulquiorra is a very cold, callous, and dispassionate figure, and is rather aloof, brooding, and indifferent, willing to harm both his comrades and enemies should they get in his way.

rows.name: Ryūmon Ikkaku Madarame
rows.function_desc: Ikkaku is violent, fight-loving, and rude, which has been noted by Tetsuzaemon Iba, among others. He loves fighting so much, he is unwilling to travel anywhere without a sword, resorting to carrying a wooden one when posing as a student at Karakura High School.

rows.function_desc: Can upgrade main character and partners'exclusive skill level

rows.name: Name-changing Card
rows.function_desc: You can use it to change your in-game name, you need to refresh the page after using.

rows.name: Clan-changing Card
rows.function_desc: You can change your Clan with this card, before using, please make sure that you're not in a Guild. You need to refresh the page after using.

rows.name: Shūhei Hisagi
rows.function_desc:
Shūhei Hisagi is a tall and lean-built man with dark grey eyes,

short black hair and three scars straight over his right eye that

lead down his cheek.

rows.name: Senjumaru Shutara
rows.function_desc:
Senjumaru has the appearance of a slender and very youthful woman with fair skin and long

black hair that is adorned at the back by a large golden ornament in the shape of a crescent moon with numerous small lines radiating outwards.

rows.name: Isane Kotetsu
rows.function_desc:
Isane is a tall, young looking woman with gray eyes and short messy silver hair with strands on the right side of her face that are shoulder-length and styled as two thin braids.

She wears a thin dangling red earring on each ear and a standard Shinigami uniform with her lieutenant badge on her left arm.

rows.name: Kurotsuchi Mayuri
rows.function_desc:
Kurotsuchi Mayuri is the 12th Division Captain of The Gotei 13 and the 2nd minister of technology R&D department.

Besides, he is the author of medical column "cerebral tonic" of Seireitei communication set.

rows.function_desc: Use to refresh main character and partners' attack effect

rows.name: Soul Stone
rows.function_desc: Use to refresh main character and partners' attribute power

rows.function_desc: Increase designated partner's EXP by 1000000 points, can't use on main character.

rows.function_desc: New Year Event Tool

rows.function_desc: New Year Event tool, can be obtained from Instance and Stages

rows.function_desc: New Year Event Tool

rows.function_desc: Use to randomly obtain a Tier 12 Hōgu.

rows.name: Kōga Kuchiki
rows.function_desc:
He is a former 3rd Seat of the 6th Division who later revolted against the Seireitei.

He was also a member of the Kuchiki Clan, having married into it.

rows.name: Sexy Kūkaku
rows.function_desc:
Kūkaku is youthful-looking woman of average height.

She has green eyes and wears bandages over her long messy black hair that parts down in half at the small of her back.

rows.name: Shy Nemu
rows.function_desc:
She is a woman of few words. She is slender,

youthful and loyal to Kurotsuchi Mayuri.

rows.name: Elegant Unohana
rows.function_desc:
Retsu Unohana is the captain of the Fourth Division in the Gotei 13.

She is one of the oldest and most experienced captains.Unohana has the appearance of a slender and very youthful woman with blue eyes and black hair.

rows.name: Noble Isane
rows.function_desc:
Despite she's always timid and shy , her personality differs

a lot when fighting.

rows.name: Tessai Tsukabishi
rows.function_desc:
Tessai Tsukabishi is an employee of Urahara Shop and a childhood friend of Kisuke Urahara and Yoruichi Shihōin.

One hundred years ago, he was the Captain of the Kidō Corps in Soul Society.

rows.name: Void Region Chest
rows.function_desc: The chest includes Coupons and Soul of Conquest.

rows.name: Void Region Chest
rows.function_desc: The chest includes Coupons and Exclusive Fragments.

rows.name: Void Region Chest
rows.function_desc:
The chest includes Reincarnation Stones,

Soul Refining Stones, Soul Stones and Coupons.

rows.name: Weed
Handsome Toshiro
rows.function_desc:
Toshiro is the captain of the 10th Division in the Gotei 13.

He is relatively young by Shinigami standards, and has the appearance of a child.

rows.name: Delicate Yachiru
rows.function_desc:
Yachiru Kusajishi is the lieutenant of the 11th Division in the Gotei 13, under

Captain Kenpachi Zaraki, as well as the President of the Shinigami Women's Association.

rows.name: Lv.130 Kingslayer Set Chest
rows.function_desc: Legendary Equipment Chest

rows.name: Lv.140 Legendary Equipment Chest
rows.function_desc: Lv.140 Legendary Equipment Chest

rows.function_desc: Lv.120 Accessory Chest

rows.name: Ryūjin Jakka Illustration
rows.function_desc: Use the Illustration to activate Zanpakuto: Ryūjin Jakka

rows.name: Asauchi
rows.function_desc: Asauchi is a necessary material for advancing.

rows.name: Gentle Byakuya
rows.function_desc:
An emotional guy who used to

thinking thoroughly and calmly.

rows.name: Lv.130 Accessory Chest
rows.function_desc: Lv.130 Accessory Chest

rows.name: Red Reishi Chest
rows.function_desc: Open the chest to randomly get 5 - 14 Red Reishi.

rows.name: Bambietta Basterbine
rows.function_desc:
Bambietta is a slender young girl with long, straight, dark brown hair and brown eyes.

Her attire is a variation of the Sternritter's typical white uniform, consisting of the

order's signature hooded-cloak, a thigh-length trench coat, knee-high boots,

a miniskirt, and black stockings with a red trim on her gloves and boots.

rows.name: Advanced Modify Fragment
rows.function_desc: Used to reset attributes of modified partners

rows.name: Raijin Yoruichi
rows.function_desc:
Youruichi under Shunko form, who acts with free will and releases totally different reiatsu

that changes 48 times each second.

rows.name: Muken Aizen
rows.function_desc:
After the grand war, Aizen, who was sealed at that time, was transferred to the Central 46 for an 18,800-year sentence.

Then the duration was extended to 20,000 years due to his disdain to the law.

rows.name: Haschwalth
rows.function_desc:
Jugram Haschwalth is a Quincy and the Wandenreich's Sternritter Grandmaster. He is also the advisor to Emperor Yhwach and

the substitute as the monarch when Yhwach sleeps, as well as the second-in-command of the Wandenreich.[5] Yhwach refers to him as his "other half".

rows.name: Bankai Urahara
rows.function_desc:
We're devoured by the inevitable fear and ignorance, those who

evaded are the chosen ones to fulfill the destiny.

rows.name: Inferno Stone
rows.function_desc: You can use the Inferno Stones to exchange for rewards

rows.name: Coupon Chest
rows.function_desc: Open to get 500 Coupons

rows.name: Human Komamura
rows.function_desc:
Komamura gives up his heart in exchange for his indestructible human form

and Bankai via werewolf's Humanization Technique.

rows.name: Bankai Kenpachi
rows.function_desc:
Guided by Kusajishi, Kenpachi's skin turned red

and became invulnerable by using his Bankai.

rows.name: Shunkō Suì-Fēng
rows.function_desc:
In battle against Shihōin, Suì-Fēng has mastered Shunkō and continues to practice for perfection.

Swirls of wind will circle around her till the end of fight.

rows.name: Minazuki Illustration
rows.function_desc: Use this Illustration to activate Zanpakutō: Minazuki.

rows.name: Lv.140 Accessory Chest
rows.function_desc: Lv.140 Accessory Chest

rows.name: Bankai Genryūsai
rows.function_desc:
Genryūsai, top Shinigami in a thousand year, has mastered Bankai Ryūjin Jakka: Zanka no Tachi. He can erase any enemies by a mere touch of blade

and cover himself with raging flame so no offender can come close to the sword holder. This is the most powerful Bankai.

rows.name: Jester Box
rows.function_desc: Daily Gift

rows.name: Shin Daiguren Tōshirō
rows.function_desc:
Shin Daiguren Tōshirō is the completed form of Tōshirō's Bankai power with mature look and shape.

The unleashed Daiguren Hyōrinmaru can freeze everything to death in a few seconds.

rows.name: Bazz-B
rows.function_desc:
Bazz-B is a member of the Wandenreich's Sternritter, with the designation "H" - "The Heat", which means he can control fire in battle just like his hot-headed personality.

He keeps his purple hair in a long Mohawk and he is a friend of Haschwalth since childhood.

rows.name: candy
rows.function_desc: 空座町庆典活动道具,可在虚圈糖果中充值获得

rows.function_desc: 打开可获得：大师级怒气石*1、专属碎片*100、赫利贝尔宠物碎片*100、宝具升级符*10、副宠经验卡*10.

rows.name: CDK宝箱2
rows.function_desc: 打开可获得：大师级怒气石*1、专属碎片*200、赫利贝尔宠物碎片*200、宝具升级符*20、副宠经验卡*20、100级神装宝箱*1.

rows.name: CDK宝箱3
rows.function_desc: 打开可获得：大师级怒气石*2、专属碎片*500、南瓜魂宠物碎片*300、宝具升级符*70、副宠经验卡*50、12阶宝具盒*1、120级神装宝箱*3.

rows.name: CDK宝箱4
rows.function_desc: 打开可获得：特级怒气石*1、专属碎片*700、新春塔克宠物碎片*500、宝具升级符*100、副宠经验卡*80、12阶宝具盒*2、130级神装宝箱*2.

rows.name: Valkyrie
rows.function_desc:
Gerard Valkyrie is a member of the Wandenreich's Sternritter with the designation "M" - The Miracle.

His body is resilient enough to recover from multiple fatal attack and this makes him the indestructible deity.

rows.name: Kyōka Suigetsu Picture Book
rows.function_desc: Use this Picture Book to activate Zanpakutō: Kyōka Suigetsu.

rows.name: Partner Expansion
rows.function_desc: You can add 1 more partner into your partners list after use.

rows.name: CDK宝箱5
rows.function_desc: 打开可获得：万能改造碎片宝箱*50、专属碎片*100、8级灵石宝盒*1.

rows.name: Bankai Shunsui Kyōraku
rows.function_desc:
The Captain-Commander of the Gotei 13. He lost his right eye in the battle with Wandenreich. Upon his Bankai Bones of Heavenly Blooming Madness·Withering Pine Lovers' Suicide release, an aura covers a large area around Shunsui.

This aura changes others' perception of the surrounding environment, making them perceive it as darkened, bleak and gloomy, and causes others to feel varying levels of melancholy and despair. His Bankai includes four act, which is the most dramatic Bankai.

rows.name: Points
rows.function_desc: 空座町庆典活动道具,可在虚圈糖果中充值获得

rows.name: 200 Top-up Card
rows.function_desc: Increase topped up amount but won't give Gold(Top-up rebate event excluded)

rows.name: 500 Top-up Card
rows.function_desc: Increase topped up amount but won't give Gold(Top-up rebate event excluded)

rows.name: 1000 Top-up Card
rows.function_desc: Increase topped up amount but won't give Gold(Top-up rebate event excluded)

rows.name: Hell Verse Ichigo
rows.function_desc:
Empowered by the hell, Ichigo shields himself with golden armor, and he can release Golden Getsuga

Tenshō with golden reiatsu. In this status, his speed and reiatsu are greatly enhanced.

rows.name: Kokutō
rows.function_desc:
A fallen Togaito who was eager for freedom again. Even Bankai Ichigo was no match

for the powerful and speedy Kokutō.

rows.name: Tier 13 Hōgu Chest
rows.function_desc: Use to randomly obtain a Tier 13 Hōgu.

rows.name: Blood War Byakuya
rows.function_desc:
Badly injured during Wandenreich's assault on Soul Society,

Byakuya recovered under the care of Zero Division and became even more powerful.

rows.name: Sternritter Uryū Ishida
rows.function_desc:
Uryū Ishida betrayed his friends to join 

Yhwach's Schutzstaffel and become his successor, he received the same designation as Yhwach "A" - Antithesis

rows.name: Askin
rows.function_desc:
Askin is a member of the Wandenreich's Sternritter with the designation "D" - Deathdealing, one of the

four members of Yhwach Fraccion, and he was the last member to be recognized by Yhwach.

rows.name: Kūgo Ginjō
rows.function_desc:
A Fullbringer and the leader of the organization known as Xcution, he is also a former Substitute Shinigami. He, however, quits the position on purpose,

hides in the Human world to summon Fullbringers to his camp, and signs the contract to collect power with the Xcution members so that they can use their power mutually.

rows.name: Calligraphy
rows.function_desc: Use this Picture Book to activate Zanpakutō:Ichimonji

rows.name: Shūkurō Tsukishima
rows.function_desc:
A Fullbringer and a former member of Xcution. Tsukishima is cold and collected in most things he does. His ability "Book of the End" can

insert him into the target's past without hurting the opponent and change the target's memory.

rows.name: Riruka Dokugamine
rows.function_desc:
A Fullbringer and member of Xcution. Riruka is an impatient and hot-tempered young girl

who loves donuts and cute things. She likes Ichigo.

rows.name: Yukio Hans Vorarlberna
rows.function_desc:
A Fullbringer and member of Xcution. He loves playing video games. Rarely talks, always use gaming terms when he does.

Doesn’t get alomg with Riruka, always make fun of her actions. Yukio is smart, able to calmly solve sudden issues.

rows.name: 军团币宝箱
rows.function_desc: 打开可获得：军团币*10

rows.name: Moe Shishigawara
rows.function_desc:
Moe is a troublesome teenager with a mohawk hair style, he respects and worship Shūkurō Tsukishima.

Efficient in hand-to-hand combat, but he has a weakness against beautiful girls.

rows.name: 军团币宝箱(9999)
rows.function_desc: 打开可获得：军团币*9999

rows.name: Fullbring Ichigo
rows.function_desc:
With the help of XCUTION members, Ichigo utilize Substitute Shinigami Badge to release his Clad Type FullBring Form.

 In this form, he obtained amazing speed, and able to use Getsuga Tenshō against enemies.

rows.name: Blood War Mayuri
rows.function_desc:
Mayuri is the 12th Division Captain in Gotei 13, 2nd President of the Shinigami Research Institutes. He has weird personality and personifies the stereotype of the mad scientist

. In Royal Realm, he faught against Pernida Parnkgjas with Nemu Kurotsuchi.

rows.name: Szayelaporro Granz
rows.function_desc:
Espada No.8, symbolize death by craziness. He has a pair of rectangular-framed glasses as his hollow mask, pink short hair with golden eyes.

Most advanced scientist in hollow world, responsible for intel and data collection.

rows.name: Yammy Llargo
rows.function_desc:
Espada No.10, symbolize death by "Rage". He has a huge body, he can grow even bigger during battle with his rage because of that his spiritual and physical strength will also increase

. He is the only Espada that will change his number when activate Resurrección. Just like his zanpakuto's name, Yammy's power came from his rage.

rows.name: Benihime Picture Book
rows.function_desc: Using this picture book can activate Zanpakuto : Benihime

rows.name: CFYOW Grimmjow
rows.function_desc:
Arrancar Espada Rank No. 6, Symbolize death by Destroy. Kurosaki Ichigo's old enemy.

. Near the end of Blood War, he helped Urahara Kisuke to defeat Askin.

rows.name: Blood War Crystal
rows.function_desc: Use Blood War Crystal for Soul King Palace Refinery

rows.name: CFYOW Ulquiorra
rows.function_desc:
Arrancar Espada Rank No.4, Symbolize death by Void. Kurosaki Ichigo's old enemy.

After the death of Yhwach during Blood War, Aizen's Hogyoku divide itself, resurrect and power up the Espada's. They attack Seireitei and attempt to rescue Aizen.

rows.name: CFYOW Nelliel
rows.function_desc:
Former Arrancar Espada Rank No.3.

A good friend of Kurosaki Ichigo. After the death of Yhwach during Blood War, hogyoku powered up Nelliel also. Luckily, she will be aiding Ichigo.

rows.name: Spirit Essence
rows.function_desc: Using Spirit Essence can foritfy and upgrade Spirit Hogu

rows.name: CFYOW Harribel
rows.function_desc: Arrancar Espada Rank No.3, Symbolizes death by Sacrifice. De facto ruler of Hueco Mundo after Aizen's defeat. Following the death of Yhwach during Blood War, the Hogyoku powered up Harribel into a new form.

rows.name: CFYOW Coyote Stark
rows.function_desc: CFYOW version of Coyote Stark. A Vanguard who fights with Los Lobos and overwhelms enemy assaulters and supporters with Cero Metralleta.

rows.name: Quilge Opie
rows.function_desc: Quilge Opie is the executive hunting captain of the first Jagdarmee of the Wandenreich. He is also a member of the Sternritter with the designation J: The Jail, called Quilge Opie of "the Jail".
